info.title: List Video Generation Tasks
info.description: Pass filter parameters to return matching video generation tasks. Only historical data from the last 7 days can be queried. Time calculation is always based on UTC timestamps. The timestamp interval is [T-7 days, T), where T is the request time accurate to the second.

get.description:
Pass filter parameters to return matching video generation tasks. Only historical data from the last 7 days can be queried. Time calculation is always based on UTC timestamps. The timestamp interval is [T-7 days, T), where T is the request time accurate to the second.

> Note: The following parameters are Query String Parameters, passed in the URL string.

parameters.name: page_num
parameters.description: Page number of the returned results.

parameters.name: filter.status
parameters.description:
Filter parameter used to query tasks with a specific status.

- queued: Task in queue.
- running: Task in progress.
- cancelled: Cancelled task.
- succeeded: Successful task.
- failed: Failed task.

parameters.name: filter.task_ids
parameters.description: Video generation task ID for exact search. Supports batch search by repeating the parameter name, for example: `filter.task_ids=id1&filter.task_ids=id2`.

parameters.name: filter.model
parameters.description: Model ID or endpoint ID for exact search. Only one input is supported. When the permission of your API key is Custom, manually enter the model ID or endpoint ID to query. A model resource generally corresponds to one preconfigured inference endpoint and multiple custom inference endpoints. Model ID is bound to the preconfigured inference endpoint.When a model ID is entered, video generation tasks initiated by calling this preconfigured inference endpoint will be returned.

parameters.name: filter.service_tier
parameters.description: Service tier used for task processing. `default` means online inference mode, and `flex` means offline inference mode.

200.description: Query succeeded. Returns matching video generation tasks.

BearerAuth.description: Pass `Authorization: Bearer <token>` in the request header.

items.description: List of found video generation tasks.

total.description: Number of tasks that meet the filter conditions.

model.description: Model name and version used for this task in the format model name-version.

status.description:
Task status.

- queued: Task in queue.
- running: Task in progress.
- cancelled: Cancelled task.
- succeeded: Successful task.
- failed: Failed task.
- expired: Expired task.

created_at.description: Unix timestamp in seconds of the task creation time.

updated_at.description: Unix timestamp in seconds of the last update time of the task's current status.

seed.description: Seed integer value used for this request.

ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated video.

duration.description: Duration of the generated video in seconds. Either `duration` or `frames` is returned. If `frames` is not specified when creating a video generation task, `duration` is returned.

frames.description: Frame count of the generated video. Either `duration` or `frames` is returned. If `frames` is specified when creating a video generation task, `frames` is returned.

framespersecond.description: Frame rate of the generated video.

generate_audio.description:
Whether the generated video includes sound synchronized with the footage. Only Seedance 2.0 series and Seedance 1.5 Pro return this parameter.

- true:The video output by the model includes synchronized audio.
- false:The video output by the model is a silent video.

tools.description: Tools actually used by the model for this request. Not returned if no tool is used.

safety_identifier.description: Unique identifier of the end user. If this parameter is set when creating a video generation task, the interface returns it as is.

priority.description: Execution priority of the current request.

draft.description:
Whether the generated video is a draft video. Only Seedance 1.5 Pro returns this parameter.

- true: Indicates the current output is a draft video.
- false: Indicates the current output is a normal video.

draft_task_id.description: Draft video task ID. Returned when a formal video is generated based on a draft video.

service_tier.description: Service tier actually used for task processing.

TaskError.description: Error message. Returns null if the task succeeds; returns error data if the task fails.

VideoTaskContent.description: Output when the video generation task is completed, including the download URL of the generated video.

last_frame_url.description: URL of the last frame image of the video. Returned when `return_last_frame=true` is set when creating a video generation task.

type.description:
Tool type actually used.

- web_search: Web search tool.

completion_tokens.description: Number of tokens consumed for the model to output the video, which can be used for billing reconciliation. Seedance 2.0 series models have a minimum token usage limit. If actual token usage is less than the minimum,  this parameter will return the minimum token usage which is used for billing.

total_tokens.description: Total number of tokens consumed by this request. Video generation models do not count input tokens, so input tokens are 0 and `total_tokens=completion_tokens`.

web_search.description: Actual number of web search tool calls. Returned only when web search is enabled.
